scenes.text:
At the end of your life, you will not regret the things
you did. You will regret the things you did not do.

Studies on deathbed regrets reveal the same pattern. People do not regret failures. They regret missed opportunities. The relationship they did not
pursue. The business they did not start. The words they never said. Rejection stings for a moment. Regret haunts for a lifetime.

Make a decision today to live a life with minimal regret. Say yes to more things. Take more
chances. Tell people how you feel. The pain of action is temporary. The pain of inaction is permanent.

Twenty years from now, what will you
wish you had started today? Start it.

What do you not want to regret?
Share your truth. Follow for no-regrets living.
